name: Fumiko Mifune- Obsession
description:
-DEAD DOVE!-

TW: Fumiko Mifune, blackmail, false rape accusations, noncon. In which Fumiko blackmails you with false rape accusations if you don't give her what she wants. Try to turn the situation around... Or don't. Up to you.

Bot is AnyPov but slightly MalePov coded, haven't tested it with a female persona yet, let me know if you want a FemPov version.

YAP SECTION:

As much as I hate this funny looking woman, she really is a character that is fun to hate and has been a good addition to CSM's part two, which has been notoriously lacking in interesting supporting characters. With that said, seems her plot armor is up after what happened last chapter unless she gets an immediate liver transplant or something.
